title: Software Engineer
highlights: Developed and maintained the CES 2025 flagship demo, demonstrating live map customization using the TomTom software stack — successfully delivered for CES 2025 and continued for other company events.
Took full ownership of the project, collaborating closely with design, marketing, and key stakeholders to align technical delivery with company messaging and goals.
Built a dynamic web interface using Node.js and Flask; implemented a state machine to ensure a clear, reliable, and maintainable demo flow.
Integrated the Map-Maker tool via okHttp (Kotlin), enabling live map style customization during presentations.
Nominated for promotion to Software Engineer II, recognizing technical impact and cross-team leadership.

title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Cut feedback triage time by 80% by building and deploying a company-wide Slack bot (Python, Slack-Bolt, OpenAI API) that auto-categorized feedback from 2,000+ users across three channels and generated Jira tickets.
Improved the AmiGO App by delivering new features and fixing bugs; applied Redux-Saga (React Native) for robust side-effect management.

title: Quality Assurance Officer
highlights: Submitted daily reports, addressed safety deviations, and led corrective actions across production lines.
Developed an Excel automation tool using VBA that reduced data entry time by 70%.
